Your AI Nutrition Coach
& Personal Chef

Snap a photo of your meal to get instant calories & macro data. Scan your fridge for personalized recipes. Track water, weight, BMI and more — all in one app.

Nutrition

68%

Features

Everything you need to eat smarter

12 powerful AI features designed around your health goals.

photo_camera

AI Meal Scanner

Point your camera at any food — barcode, nutrition label, or meal photo — and get instant calories & macros breakdown.

cooking

AI Chef

Scan your fridge ingredients and get AI-generated recipe suggestions customized to what you already have at home.

monitor_heart

Nutrition Tracking

Log meals for breakfast, lunch, dinner & snacks. Animated calorie ring and macro progress toward daily goals.

water_drop

Water Tracking

Quickly add hydration with +250ml / +500ml buttons. Circular progress ring, timestamps and daily hydration tips.

show_chart

Progress & Analytics

Weight goal card, real-time BMI calculator, stacked calorie charts and weight trend graphs — all on one dashboard.

auto_awesome

Smart Goal Plans

AI-generated daily goals for calories, protein, carbs, fat and water — based on your body metrics and goals.

explore

Recipe Explorer

Browse personalized and trending recipes. Save favorites, search by keyword and get full step-by-step guides.

stars

Pro Subscription

Unlimited AI scans, priority processing and early feature access. Free tier includes 500 credits to get started.

verified iOS & Android
lock Privacy first
bolt Real-time AI
star 4.8 ★ rating
How It Works

From photo to insight in seconds

Three simple steps to take control of your nutrition.

photo_camera
01

Snap a Photo or Scan

Take a photo of your meal, fridge ingredients, barcode or nutrition label.

psychology
02

AI Analyzes

Our AI identifies the food in real-time and calculates complete nutrition data instantly.

trending_up
03

Track & Improve

Log the entry, monitor your macros & hydration, and consistently hit your daily health goals.

Analytics

Visualize Your Health Journey

Deep insights into your eating habits, weight trends and BMI — all beautifully visualized.

Protein

Goal: 120g

Carbs

Goal: 250g

Fat

Goal: 70g

BMI

Real-time BMI tracking with color-coded health status

32d

Browse 32 days of nutrition history
